name: @randroids-dojo/vibekit
description: Reusable components and bootstrap for vibe-coded games and apps. Self-contained TypeScript modules used across multiple projects (VibeRacer, Flatline, VibeCity, VibeGear2, FrackingAsteroids). The default entry exposes framework-agnostic client modules; the `./server` subpath exposes Node-only helpers (KV, signing, rate-limit).
